title: Trusted Colors
description: Adds a sophisticated name-color switching system to the game, complete with live and rec tags as well as an RP tag.
body:
# Color Selection

Using the command:

```
/trigger color
```

Will bring up a menu to select a color and status for your in game name

![An example of the menu, current selected color is GREEN](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a77698781fcef912c39e049b083d703386fa6af7.png)

Clicking on the colors will select them and change the actual color of your name.

# Status Selection

In the menu there are 3 buttons for different statuses. Clicking on these will make them show up next to your name in game:

![Message in chat from Naetilus with tags REC and RP, the color of his name is GREEN](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/214abe6649cbc5c051bd94bd97693333634a6c9f.png)

# Extra Features

An operator can use the command:


```
/tag add <playername> mod
```

This will make their name in chat show up with an [OP] tag

![Naetilus says "Like this!" with OP tag activated](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a90d2abc48aaa55055cfba25e18643589a22655a.png)

The OP tag is compatible with all other tags and colors!
